slides.title: How easily you *rise off the floor* reveals your aging.
slides.sub: Everyday mobility is freedom of movement. Here is how to keep it for life.

slides.title: The sit-to-rise test
slides.body: Getting up from the floor with *little support* is linked to longevity. It reads strength, balance and mobility at once.

slides.title: Mobility is freedom
slides.body: Mobility is the *freedom to move* through your life: kneeling, reaching, rising. It is quietly worth protecting.

slides.title: Train your range
slides.body: Sit on the floor, hold *deep squats*, work your hips and ankles. Gentle daily range keeps joints willing.

slides.title: Sitting stiffens you
slides.body: All-day sitting *quietly tightens* hips and ankles. Break it up often and move through your full range.

slides.title: Keep your range for life
slides.body: Protect the motion *you'll want at 80*: rising, bending, playing on the floor with grandkids.

slides.title: Keep the mobility that *keeps you young*.
slides.body: Vibe Health turns your daily movement and recovery into one simple score, so you can watch your habits trend up.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
How easily you get off the floor says a lot about how you're aging. 🌿

The sit-to-rise test reads strength, balance and mobility at once. Train deep squats, floor sitting and hips, and break up all-day sitting. 🔖

Vibe Health turns the movement behind your mobility into one daily score → link in bio.
youtube_title: The Floor Test That Tracks How Well You're Aging
